channel.title: Side Hustle on bizOpsPlaybook — Practical Business Plans for Solo Entrepreneurs
channel.description: Recent content in Side Hustle on bizOpsPlaybook — Practical Business Plans for Solo Entrepreneurs

item.title: How to Start a Cleaning Business in 2026: $185 Startup Kit Guide
item.description: Most “how to start a cleaning business” guides skip the part that actually matters: the math. They tell you to pick a name and register an LLC and then hand-wave the part where you have to walk into someone’s house and ask for $250 to clean it. Starting a residential cleaning business in 2026 is one of the cheapest, fastest small-business plays in the country — but only if you sequence the first 30 days correctly. Get that wrong and you spend three months “preparing to launch” instead of billing.
